examples: They do everything according to Hoyle.
After Edmond Hoyle (1672? -1769), British writer on games.
The company holds a meeting on the first Monday every month according to Hoyle.
Clark, chairman Dean Hoyle and chief executive Nigel Clibbens all deny talking to the Premier League club.
Crossbencher Lord Digby Jones, a former trade minister under Gordon Brown, agreed with Lord Hoyle.
